description: Shared TypeScript configuration for Gravity UI projects, providing a base tsconfig that can be extended.
readme:
# @gravity-ui/tsconfig

## Install
```
npm install --save-dev @gravity-ui/tsconfig
```

## Usage
Add `tsconfig.json` file in the project root with the following content: 

```json
{
    "extends": "@gravity-ui/tsconfig/tsconfig.json"
}
```
